name: Penne with Artichokes and Marinated Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive oil from mar. tomatoes
12 oz Penne pasta, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichokes and reserve the liquid. Add enough water to make 1 cup of liquid.
2. Cut the artichokes into quarters.
3. Cook and stir the 5 minced garlic cloves into 1-1/2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until golden.
4. Reduce the heat to low.
5. Add artichokes and tomatoes; simmer for 1 minute.
6. Stir in artichoke liquid, lemon juice, red pepper flakes, parsley, salt, and black pepper.
7. Simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, in a separate sauté pan, cook and stir bread crumbs and 1 tablespoon chopped garlic in the remaining 1/2 tablespoon oil.
9. Pour the artichoke sauce over penne pasta in a large bowl; toss gently to coat.
10. Sprinkle with bread crumb mixture and Romano cheese.
